title: Embedded damper speaker design
abstract: An embedded-damper speaker for an information handling system includes a top speaker housing, a bottom speaker housing, and a damper. The bottom speaker housing is in physical communication with the top speaker housing. The damper is secured in between the top and bottom speaker housings. The damper reduces acoustic resonance between the embedded-damper speaker and the information handling system.
claims: 1. An embedded-damper speaker for an information handling system, the embedded-damper speaker comprising: a top speaker housing; a bottom speaker housing in physical communication with the top speaker housing; a damper secured between the top and bottom speaker housings, the damper to reduce acoustic resonance between the embedded-damper speaker and the information handling system; and a plurality of notches, wherein a first subset of the plurality of notches is located within the bottom speaker housing and a second notch is formed between the top speaker housing and the bottom speaker housing, wherein the damper is in physical communication with the notches, wherein the second notch secures the second damper between the top and bottom speaker housings.
